title: Music randomiser
description: Removes biome-specific music and tracks not by C418, and makes it so all music plays everywhere
body:
This resource pack removes biome-specific music, and makes it so tracks not by C418 are not used.

* All non-C418 music is removed
* All remaining music plays everywhere; no longer biome-, dimension- or gamemode-specific; the warped forest also plays the normal music
* Credits still only play Alpha
* New music discs still play their original songs

If you also want music discs to play as ambient music, you can put [Music randomiser - discs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/music-randomiser-discs) *above* this pack.
